evidence.name: Sầm Nghi Đống
evidence.issue: self-weak invalid game logic — boss có element X cannot have weakness X
evidence.build_time_workaround: Sanitize: weakness HOA → THUY (element wheel counter: hỏa weak to thủy = water extinguishes fire). Original kept in _roster_weakness_original.
evidence.recommend: Roster v3 fix: weakness = THUY (per ngũ hành element wheel) OR weakness = BACH (per R87 Quang Ám Đấu, Sầm Nghi Đống is HAC path enemy from Thanh dynasty, BẠCH chính nghĩa counter HẮC).
